## What's Changed
* 🔧 Update plugin settings and file exclusions by @CinquinAndy in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/5
* chore(deps): update typescript-eslint monorepo to v7.4.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/3
* fix(deps): update dependency openai to v4.30.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/2
* 🚀 Update README with Strapi Exporter info by @CinquinAndy in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @CinquinAndy made their first contribution in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/5
* @renovate made their first contribution in https://github.com/CinquinAndy/notes-to-strapi-export-article-ai/pull/3
